name: fabric-dataflow-migration-toolkit
description: End-to-end Power BI Dataflow Gen1 to Microsoft Fabric medallion notebook migration. Export, analyze, generate bronze/silver PySpark notebooks, deploy, and validate in Fabric.

fabric_workspace_id.title: Fabric Workspace ID
fabric_workspace_id.description: GUID of the target Fabric workspace where notebooks will be deployed. Find it in the Fabric portal URL.

fabric_workspace_name.title: Fabric Workspace Name
fabric_workspace_name.description: Display name of the target Fabric workspace (e.g., 'Analytics Dev').

source_workspace_id.title: Source Power BI Workspace ID
source_workspace_id.description: GUID of the Power BI workspace containing the Dataflow Gen1 dataflows to migrate. Leave empty to specify at runtime.

bronze_lakehouse.title: Bronze Lakehouse Name
bronze_lakehouse.description: Name of the bronze layer lakehouse (raw ingestion). Default: lh_bronze

silver_lakehouse.title: Silver Lakehouse Name
silver_lakehouse.description: Name of the silver layer lakehouse (cleaned/conformed). Default: lh_silver

gold_lakehouse.title: Gold Lakehouse Name
gold_lakehouse.description: Name of the gold layer lakehouse (business-ready). Default: lh_gold

azure_tenant_id.title: Azure Tenant ID
azure_tenant_id.description: Azure Entra ID tenant ID. Required for service principal auth; leave empty for interactive auth.

azure_client_id.title: Azure Client ID
azure_client_id.description: Azure Entra ID client/application ID. Required for service principal auth.

azure_client_secret.title: Azure Client Secret
azure_client_secret.description: Azure Entra ID client secret. Stored in system keychain. Required for service principal auth.

report_unknown_patterns.title: Share unknown M patterns with the plugin author?
report_unknown_patterns.description: When the m-query-analyst detects an M pattern not in the plugin's risk catalog, should the plugin (with explicit per-pattern preview + approval) file a GitHub issue against the plugin repo so the pattern can be added to a future release? Values: 'never' (default — patterns recorded only in your local _Documentation/conversion-backlog.md), 'ask' (migration-analyst asks each run), 'always' (auto-prompt the report-unknown-patterns skill at Stage 13 with sanitization preview). Connection strings, GUIDs, file paths, and sheet names are auto-redacted before any issue is filed; you still review and approve each pattern individually.
